'''Hoth Stuff''' was a [[fathier]] that competed in a [[Fathier racing|fathier race]] in the [[city]] [[Canto Bight]]<ref name="TLJ" /> on the [[planet]] [[Cantonica]]<ref name="TLJVD">''[[Star Wars: The Last Jedi: The Visual Dictionary]]''</ref> in [[34 ABY]].<ref name="Date">{{FilmDate|VIII}}</ref> During the race, the fathier was ridden by<ref name="TLJ" /> the [[jockey]] [[Arca Yroca]],<ref name="TLJVD" /> who whipped the mount's hind quarters with an<ref name="TLJ" /> [[electrocrop]]<ref name="TLJVD" /> as they raced around the racetrack at the [[Canto Casino and Racetrack|Canto Casino]] complex.<ref name="TLJ" />

The [[human]] [[Finn]] briefly watched the race while on a [[mission to Canto Bight]] using a pair of [[electrobinoculars]] mounted to the railing of a [[casino]] in the same complex. While viewing the race, Finn focused on Hoth Stuff, and the electrobinoculars displayed the fathier's name in [[Aurebesh]]. Hoth Stuff had [[Color|brown]] [[hair|fur]], black [[eye]]s,<ref name="TLJ" /> and shared their name with the planet [[Hoth]].<ref name="AbEverything">''[[Star Wars: Absolutely Everything You Need to Know, Updated and Expanded]]''</ref>

==Behind the scenes==
{{Quote|I came up with a list of names for Ryan to choose from including, Kessel Runner, Mynock Minute, and Hoth Stuff and he went with Hoth Stuff. Kessel Runner and Mynock Minute didn't get chosen but they ended up in the Canto Bight short story anthology.|Pablo Hidalgo, about Hoth Stuff's name|<ref name="Secrets">{{StarWarsShow|p09c0MXDxto|Star Wars: The Last Jedi Secrets Explained|sw_url=video/secrets-explained-the-last-jedi}}</ref>}}
Hoth Stuff appeared in the [[2017]] film [[Star Wars: Episode VIII The Last Jedi|''Star Wars'': Episode VIII ''The Last Jedi'']], the second installment in the ''[[Star Wars]]'' [[sequel trilogy]].<ref name="TLJ" /> The fathier's name was one of several possible names offered by [[Lucasfilm Story Group]] member [[Pablo Hidalgo]] to director [[Rian Johnson]]. The other options included [[Kessel Runner]] and [[Mynock Minute]].<ref name="Secrets" /> The phrase "Hoth Stuff" originated in the [[Star Wars Legends|''Star Wars'' Legends]] continuity where it appeared as the title for the [[Star Wars (1977) 78|seventy-eighth issue]] of the [[1977]] [[Star Wars comic books|comic]] series [[Star Wars (1977)|''Star Wars'']]. The issue was written by [[David Michelinie]] and [[Bob Layton]] and published by [[Marvel Comics]]<ref name="M78">[[Star Wars (1977) 78|''Star Wars'' (1977) 78]]</ref> on [[September 13]], [[1983]].<ref name="Marvel Age">''[[Marvel Age]]'' #6</ref>
